title: Masayoshi Son notes — Vision Fund credo, 10x thinking, you-become-who-you-surround
html:
Masayoshi Son notes — Vision Fund credo, 10x thinking, you-become-who-you-surround

Source: 2022-02-28 Apple Note. Looks like Yahir's takeaway list from a Masayoshi Son talk, interview, or biography reading — a 12-line distillation of operating principles.

TL;DR

  • Vision Fund + thesis bets: Masayoshi Son's Vision Fund is named, plus his two "future-certified" thesis bets: "AI certified future" and "Meta verse certified future." In 2022 these were the two SoftBank macro-bets; the AI one aged into Yahir's own AI search thesis.
  • Purpose split: "Purpose to connect with people / purpose to build things." Yahir captures Son's two-axis frame — relational purpose vs. constructive purpose — without commentary. Lives near ikigai.
  • You-become-who-you-surround: "You become like those you surround yourself with" and "Your inputs become your output." Two clean restatements of the mentors-and-environment-as-inputs thesis.
  • 10x thinking: "Think bigger, 10x bigger" — Son's signature aspirational scaling rule, captured here as a personal note. Becomes the seed for a real concept stub.
  • Daily good-deed audit: "Have you done something good for someone today?" — written as a self-question, not an observation.
  • The boss-filter heuristic: "Would I be alright working for that person?" — Yahir captures it as a reverse-screening tool for who to associate with. Same filter Chamath articulates differently.
  • Action items at the bottom: "Make a list of people you are associated with"; "Think for 5 minutes about inventions, with the 3 different methods"; "Do python and learn to code." Son's principles immediately translated into Yahir's own todos.

Pattern observed

This is one of the clearest mentors-from-afar artifacts in the corpus — Yahir extracting a one-page operating system from a public figure he'll never meet, then converting it directly into his own action list. Same move he later runs on Shaan Puri, Chamath, AGM, etc.

10x thinking is significant enough to deserve its own concept stub — Yahir keeps using the language and the frame across multiple later docs (the Austin thesis valuation discussions, the Outpace PRD ambition framing, etc.).

Key quotes

  • "You become like those you surround yourself with."
  • "Your inputs become your output."
  • "Think bigger, 10x bigger."
  • "Would I be alright working for that person?"

related.label: Yahir's Evolving Thesis on AI Search & Distribution (2022–2026)
